response.justification: The candidate substantially exceeds the 6+ years requirement with roughly 15 years of professional experience spanning fullstack, backend, and platform work. Recent roles align well with the primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS) and the current position includes hands-on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling, which directly matches the required AI agent development experience. A strong craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, testing libraries and workshops) fits the internal-tooling and code-quality focus of the role. Gaps are mostly secondary: no explicit Nest.js, Kotlin, or Python experience, and testing framework experience is not explicitly tied to Vitest/Jest/Playwright.
strengths: 15+ years fullstack experience with recent TypeScript/Node.js/React/MongoDB product work
Current hands-on AI-agent and MCP tooling experience, a rare required skill
Deep testing and craftsmanship culture (TDD, CI/CD, authored test frameworks, taught testing courses)
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience, a core framework in the primary stack
Kotlin/Java and Python exposure appears limited or dated
Significant career investment in D-lang, a niche outside the role's ecosystem
